{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321140535DC9A0107DD52CAE20E5B"}"},"total":2995},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7362914479392310041","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"前面就杀手会有一点毒，全是强行塞入角色，接着看下去就越来越顺了。挖了一些坑，列如可爱和男主的关系。总的来说还不错的，比起一些水字文好的多了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1714313938,"group_id":"7340478068244368408","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2239078820504359"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7340478068244368408","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.5967974e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读11小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":12940,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":38907,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7362862595575464729","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，爽文，没系统，不圣母，看谋略，怼人特别爽。唯一的幸运就是巧合被女帝注意到。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1714313359,"group_id":"7340478068244368408","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7rUG3Tm5OFJBODLsJ0foDpxAeJSlqtXlM2Sdt3He9o7","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2239078820504359","user_name":"心比天高的帝牙卢卡"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2239078820504359","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7340478068244368408","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越成国公府三少爷的陈凡，为了让女帝退婚摆烂五年！终于因为太过纨绔，等到了女帝的退婚圣旨。可才退婚不久，女帝好像就后悔了！
“他怎么这么有才华？我以前怎么不知道？”
“没发觉，陈凡怎么生得这么好看！”
“好喜欢和他在一起，要是没退婚就好了！”
“陈凡！我好像喜欢上你了！你娶我好不好？我让你做皇帝！”
陈凡：“女帝生得好看又怎么样？我好不容易穿越，就算是一辈子单身，从这里跳下去，也不会为了一个女人和一群男人冒着被打入冷宫的风险去争宠！”
陈凡：“嘿嘿，乖乖女帝真好闻！”
……
